OVERLAY_HOOK_1: Every cycle you postpone a clear action, you tighten the grip of the pattern keeping you from leading.
OVERLAY_HOOK_2: Resistance does not get easier to identify over time, it gets more articulate and starts to sound like you.
OVERLAY_HOOK_3: Obedience as a reflex is not a gift you are given, it is a pattern you build by moving when it costs you.
